test_cases.input_summary: Mapping the ownership structure of a media company suspected of receiving foreign government funding through intermediary entities
test_cases.notes: Ownership trace checklist was methodical and well-adapted to the media/foreign-funding angle. Red flags section correctly identified the most relevant opacity indicators. Registry sources were specific to the jurisdiction.

test_cases.input_summary: Research plan for investigating the corporate structure of a fast-growing food delivery company before an IPO
test_cases.notes: Good integration of pre-IPO disclosure requirements. Securities filing sources were correctly identified. The dual-class share structure angle was well-anticipated.

test_cases.input_summary: Mapping the corporate structure of a charity that appears to share directors with several for-profit entities
test_cases.notes: Excellent handling of the charity/corporate overlap angle. Cross-referencing between charity commission and company registry records was clearly explained. Red flags about related-party transactions were well-targeted.
